evaluations.query: Set up GitHub API testing for my project with repos, PRs, and issues
expected_behavior: Recommends emulate as first choice over MSW/Nock for GitHub API testing
Generates an emulate.config.yaml with tokens, users, and repos sections
Includes seeded tokens mapped to emulated user logins instead of real credentials
Shows how to start emulate with --service github --seed flag
Sets GITHUB_API_BASE env var to point tests at the emulated API

evaluations.query: How to run tests in parallel in CI without port collisions?
expected_behavior: Assigns each worker a unique port using base port + VITEST_WORKER_ID offset
Creates a separate emulator instance per worker to avoid shared state
Calls github.reset() or github.close() in afterAll to clean up resources
Does not use a single shared emulator port across parallel workers

evaluations.query: Test webhook delivery with signature verification
expected_behavior: Configures a webhook receiver endpoint in the test to accept POST callbacks
Verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature using crypto.timingSafeEqual for constant-time comparison
Uses a shared webhook secret between the emulator config and the receiver
Does not skip signature verification even in test environments

evaluations.query: Generate an emulate config for my project that uses GitHub and Vercel APIs
expected_behavior: Produces a valid emulate.config.yaml with tokens, github, and vercel sections
Tokens section maps token names to login and scopes rather than hardcoding real tokens
GitHub section includes users and repos with owner, name, and default_branch
Vercel section includes users with username/email and projects with name/framework
Recommends placing the config in a .emulate/ directory or project root

evaluations.query: I want to develop offline without hitting real GitHub APIs
expected_behavior: Recommends emulate for offline GitHub API development
Shows npx emulate --service github to start the local emulator
Explains that state is fully local and persists across API calls
Mentions that GITHUB_API_BASE env var redirects SDK/CLI calls to localhost

evaluations.query: How should I handle authentication tokens in my emulated test environment?
expected_behavior: Seeds tokens in emulate.config.yaml mapped to emulated user logins
Never uses real production tokens or credentials in test configs
Shows that seeded tokens have configurable scopes for permission testing
Demonstrates using different tokens (dev_token, ci_token) for different permission levels
